testcase.name: test_02_create_product
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_grocery_laundry_admin.py:230: in test_02_create_product assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to create product: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create product: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","store_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"TEST_Organic Apples","description":"Fresh organic apples","brand":"FarmFresh","category_id":"74da5665-8baa-4bea-a12e-c29ee5feb3a8","mrp":150.0,"selling_price":120.0,"unit_type":"kg","unit_value":1,"current_stock":50,"low_stock_threshold":10,"is_organic":true,"is_fresh":true,"images":[],"tags":["organic","fresh"]},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_02_create_pricing_per_item
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_grocery_laundry_admin.py:677: in test_02_create_pricing_per_item assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to create pricing: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create pricing: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","store_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"service_id":"28244671-85a8-40c3-99c4-a8e9e043b959","item_id":"1e98a3c2-f22b-4815-8138-1e12827da5d4","pricing_type":"per_item","price":50.0},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_02_create_time_slot
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_grocery_laundry_admin.py:744: in test_02_create_time_slot assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to create time slot: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create time slot: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","store_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"slot_type":"pickup","start_time":"09:00","end_time":"12:00","max_capacity":10,"days_of_week":["monday","tuesday","wednesday","thursday","friday"]},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"int_parsing","loc":["body","days_of_week",0],"msg":"Input should be a valid integer, unable to parse string as an integer","input":"monday","url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/int_parsing"},{"type":"int_parsing","loc":["body","days_of_week",1],"msg":"Input should be a valid integer, unable to parse string as an integer","input":"tuesday","url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/int_parsing"},{"type":"int_parsing","loc":["body","days_of_week",2],"msg":"Input should be a valid integer, unable to parse string as an integer","input":"wednesday","url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/int_parsing"},{"type":"int_parsing","loc":["body","days_of_week",3],"msg":"Input should be a valid integer, unable to parse string as an integer","input":"thursday","url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/int_parsing"},{"type":"int_parsing","loc":["body","days_of_week",4],"msg":"Input should be a valid integer, unable to parse string as an integer","input":"friday","url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/int_parsing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
